channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Trump confirms meeting with China’s Xi Jinping delayed as war on Iran rages
item.description: US President Donald Trump delays his trip to Beijing while also seeking China's help to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Araghchi: Iran’s system holds despite targeted leaders
item.description: Iran’s foreign minister is pushing back after the killings of top officials.

item.title: ‘This is America’s war’: Iran’s Foreign Minister Araghchi
item.description: Iran’s foreign minister blames the US for regional escalation and says Washington is responsible for all consequences.

item.title: Killing of Larijani will not destabilise Iranian political system: Minister
item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi says US-Israeli assassinations will not topple Tehran's 'strong political structure'.

item.title: Drone attacks hit near US embassy in Baghdad
item.description: Fires have broken out in Baghdad’s Green Zone after a drone swarm, purportedly launched by Iran-aligned groups.

item.title: Experts discuss ‘Israeli strategy’ in killing of senior Iran official Ali L
item.description: Ross Harrison joins a panel on what the US and Israel are seeking with their killing of senior Iranian leaders.

item.title: ‘We’ll be doing something with Cuba very soon’, Trump says
item.description: While waging war on Iran, the US president and his secretary of state are demanding a leadership change in Cuba.

item.title: Iran allowing more ships through Strait of Hormuz, data suggest
item.description: Number of ships transiting Strait of Hormuz has nearly doubled in recent days, maritime intelligence company says.

item.title: Ukraine sends 201 military experts to counter Iranian drones in the Gulf
item.description: Ukraine President Zelenskyy says Moscow, Tehran 'brothers in hatred'; claims Iran's drones 'contain Russian components'.

item.title: Who is Joe Kent, and why did he resign as Trump’s counterterrorism chief?
item.description: Kent is the highest-level official to leave Trump administration over the US president's decision to wage war on Iran.
